consistency.notes: The spell description is consistent with established D&D 5e mechanics for Polymorph. The rules regarding CR limit, statistics replacement, hit points handling, gear melding, and action restrictions are standard.

quality.notes: The description is comprehensive and clearly details the transformative effects, limitations, and what happens upon duration end or reduction to 0 HP. The component quality (M: a caterpillar cocoon) is flavorful.

mechanics.core_mechanic: Transformation into a beast form, constrained by CR/Level.
mechanics.impact_on_stats: Full replacement of game statistics, except alignment and personality.
mechanics.hp_handling: Uses new form's HP; excess damage carries over upon reversion if HP drops to 0 in new form (unless it reduces normal form HP to 0).
restrictions: Cannot speak or cast spells in new form.
No effect on shapechangers or creatures at 0 HP.
mechanics.class_coverage: Bard, Druid, Sorcerer, Wizard (Appropriate for a high-utility 4th-level transmutation spell).

analysis.suggested_revisions: None required. The data is accurate and complete for its intended purpose.
